content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed changes for test speedup and follow-mode improvements. The changes include: (1) `[profile.test] debug = 0` to speed up test compilation, (2) a configurable `follow_poll_interval_ms` test knob, (3) replacement of fixed sleeps with polling-based `wait_for_condition` helpers, (4) a watcher condition fix from `include_logs && stream_output` to `!include_logs || stream_output` enabling file watchers for default follow mode, and (5) a new `next_follow_poll_delay` function for adaptive polling. All tests pass (787 pass, 0 fail). Clippy has 17 errors but all are pre-existing. The watcher condition change is a behavioral improvement (not just a test speedup) — it enables file watchers for the default `--follow` mode which previously relied solely on 2-second polling. This is correct and makes the follow mode more responsive in production, not just tests. No real bugs or safety issues found.

## Amendments

None.
